_note: Read-only JSON mirror of config/config.js for reference and other tools. The web app reads config.js (a plain-JS file so it works when you just open index.html). If you edit the hunt, edit config.js — this file is documentation.

stopConfigExample.name: The Psychic Trial
stopConfigExample.clueText: Where the family gathers to watch the big screen, your next challenge waits unseen.
stopConfigExample.hintText: Think of the coziest room in the house.
